conflicts.description: The prior continuity sheet treated the KRW 40,000,000 Haneul diaspora pledge as withdrawn. In the final manuscript ledger board, that pledge is ON HOLD, and a separate KRW 20,000,000 reserve is listed as REVOKED.
conflicts.canonical_value: Open Exchange funds are KRW 90,000,000 withdrawn, KRW 40,000,000 on hold, KRW 20,000,000 revoked, and KRW 1,384,110 on hand.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 18 presents a live operating ledger at the active Open Exchange site; these values directly constrain same-chapter operations, so they are the most causally embedded canonical state.

conflicts.description: The prior sheet estimated a 7-8 month span. Dated anchors in the revised manuscript constrain cycle-02 action more tightly to about 6-7 months.
conflicts.canonical_value: Estimated story span for cycle 02 is about 6-7 months (roughly June-December 2027).
conflicts.resolution_note: Explicit in-text dates (2027-07-01 entry and 2027-12-19 permit) provide hard anchors; using these dates reduces ambiguity from earlier broad estimation.
